heading: Definitions
label: 6735 Definitions
notes: Termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific IslandsFor termination of Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, see note set out preceding , Territories and Insular Possessions.section 1681 of Title 48

children.heading: Court of competent jurisdiction
children.label: 1 Court of competent jurisdiction
children.text: The term “court of competent jurisdiction” means a court authorized pursuant to to adjudicate litigation arising under this subchapter.section 6734(a) of this title

children.heading: Domicile
children.label: 2 Domicile
children.text: The term “domicile” means the State in which an insurer is incorporated, chartered, or organized.

children.heading: Insurance licensee
children.label: 3 Insurance licensee
children.text: The term “insurance licensee” means any person holding a license under State law to act as insurance agent, subagent, broker, or consultant.

children.heading: Institution
children.label: 4 Institution
children.text: The term “institution” means a corporation, joint stock company, limited liability company, limited liability partnership, association, trust, partnership, or any similar entity.

children.heading: Licensed State
children.label: 5 Licensed State
children.text: The term “licensed State” means any State, the District of Columbia, any territory of the United States, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, the Virgin Islands, and the Northern Mariana Islands in which the redomesticating insurer has a certificate of authority in effect immediately prior to the redomestication.

children.heading: Mutual insurer
children.label: 6 Mutual insurer
children.text: The term “mutual insurer” means a mutual insurer organized under the laws of any State.

children.heading: Person
children.label: 7 Person
children.text: The term “person” means an individual, institution, government or governmental agency, State or political subdivision of a State, public corporation, board, association, estate, trustee, or fiduciary, or other similar entity.

children.heading: Policyholder
children.label: 8 Policyholder
children.text: The term “policyholder” means the owner of a policy issued by a mutual insurer, except that, with respect to voting rights, the term means a member of a mutual insurer or mutual holding company granted the right to vote, as determined under applicable State law.

children.heading: Redomesticated insurer
children.label: 9 Redomesticated insurer
children.text: The term “redomesticated insurer” means a mutual insurer that has redomesticated pursuant to this subchapter.

children.heading: Redomesticating insurer
children.label: 10 Redomesticating insurer
children.text: The term “redomesticating insurer” means a mutual insurer that is redomesticating pursuant to this subchapter.

children.heading: Redomestication or transfer
children.label: 11 Redomestication or transfer
children.text: The term “redomestication” or “transfer” means the transfer of the domicile of a mutual insurer from one State to another State pursuant to this subchapter.

children.heading: State insurance regulator
children.label: 12 State insurance regulator
children.text: The term “State insurance regulator” means the principal insurance regulatory authority of a State, the District of Columbia, any territory of the United States, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, the Virgin Islands, and the Northern Mariana Islands.

children.heading: State law
children.label: 13 State law
children.text: The term “State law” means the statutes of any State, the District of Columbia, any territory of the United States, Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, the Virgin Islands, and the Northern Mariana Islands and any regulation, order, or requirement prescribed pursuant to any such statute.

children.heading: Transferee domicile
children.label: 14 Transferee domicile
children.text: The term “transferee domicile” means the State to which a mutual insurer is redomesticating pursuant to this subchapter.

children.heading: Transferor domicile
children.label: 15 Transferor domicile
children.text: The term “transferor domicile” means the State from which a mutual insurer is redomesticating pursuant to this subchapter.
